name: Islamic State 2016
authors: 414th JFG (kit based on Starfire's Toyota Al Gaib)
description: The self-styled caliphate at its 2016 high-water mark: no air force, but a deep bench of Toyota technicals, DShK/KORD gun trucks, ZU-23 flak, and the signature suicide VBIED (DIM' KAMIKAZE). Around Mosul it fights from among the people, fed by ammo caches and the ratline west toward Tal Afar and Syria. A thin crust of captured air defence — an SA-6 over the city, SA-8/9/13 across the ring — makes SEAD a real job; the constant threat is guns, MANPADS, and the truck bomb. Built for the Iraq COIN campaign.
